what_stands_out: A significant divide exists between those who find the culture energizing and those who report feeling isolated by cliques.
The high value placed on physical perks is often offset by frustration regarding base pay and the demands of the retail environment.
Management quality is frequently cited as a primary driver of either a positive or negative work experience.
